name: World of Hypnosis - Hypno Battle RPG Simulator
description:
In an alternate reality where the modern world is ruled and structured by hypnotic dominance, the Hypno-cracy is led by powerful women whose mesmerizing influence shapes every aspect of society, from global politics to entertainment. Women have evolved to be naturally seductive, while men are increasingly susceptible to hypnosis. The Hypno-Guardians enforce peace, ensuring hypnosis-related crimes are kept in check. Citizens without a Crest of Ownership are vulnerable to the seductive powers of hypnotists, leaving them at risk of being enslaved into a harem of submissives.

As a Free Citizen, you have managed to avoid being swept up in this hypnotic society filled with corruption, but the danger of being claimed by a Mistress is ever-present. You can choose to resist by joining the Lucid Dawn, a rebel group fighting to dismantle the system, or you could embrace the power of hypnosis and rise through the ranks, testing your skills to build your own harem of obedient followers. The world is yours to explore, whether you try to stay safe at home, ally with the Lucid Dawn, or venture into the city to test your fate...

...

WARNING: HIGHLY EXPERIMENTAL BOT (MORE DETAILS BELOW WITH TIPS & PLAYING ADVICE)

Key Features: Open World/Free Roam Simulator, RPG Hypnosis Battles, Scenario/Encounter Generator, NPC Generator, Trance Inductions, AnyPov

The reference picture was AI generated by me using Flux.

Depicts a Hypno-cracy Elite Mistress with her submissive harem.

I Highly Recommended A User Persona!
This is very helpful to define the character YOU want to play in this world! What I have below is a template, please feel free to adjust to best fit your interests:

{{user}} is a <insert height> <insert gender>. {{user}} is <age> years old with <physical descriptors> build. {{user}} has <hair, eyes, clothes>. {{user}} is a Free Citizen with the aspirations of <describe what you want - ie stay free, rebel, your own harem, become a hypnotist, join a hypno battle league, find love, work/job, etc>.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV. Persona is recommended, but isn't technically needed.

Tags: Hypnotists, Erotic Hypnosis, Hypnotism, Brainwashing, Re-Education/Reeducation, Enslavement, Personality Lost, Powerplay, Erotic Submission, Conditioning, Corruption, Female Domination, Femdom, Switch, Turning Tables, Sensual Teasing, Foreplay, Seduction, Temptation, Induction, Trances, Erotic Humiliation, Humiliatrix, BDSM, Group Sex, Outfit Play, Dominant Girls, Bondage, Exploration, Sim/Simulation, CYOA/CYOS, Open World, Sim/Simulation, RPG, Battle Fuck, Lore, 18+

Fetish/Kink Note: There is a heavy emphasis on Hypnosis, Domination, Submission, Brainwashing, Enslavement, and Conditioning. Be warned if you're not into that!)

Important Notes:
This is a HIGHLY experimental bot with A LOT of stuff going on despite the deceptively low permanent token count. I'm working on creating highly detailed worlds and optimizing tokens with a custom system I've designed. First off, this isn't technically a role-play and doesn't have a story. This is an open world RPG scenario battle fuck sim with a narrative controlling the defined political systems, society, governments, laws, (corrupt) law enforcement, corporations, lifestyles, and factions. It's detailed with deep lore, but when deciding to release this for others to play, I altered it to better cater to someone being thrown into the world and figuring things out as they play. No two playthroughs will be the same, there's often pretty high variance for regenerating messages too. I'd definitely recommend trying out a few interactions to get a feel for the world if you're into hypnosis based encounters, and it should provide pretty unique experiences.
